dependencies.name: hf-xet
dependencies.markers: platform_machine == 'AMD64' or platform_machine == 'aarch64' or platform_machine == 'amd64' or platform_machine == 'arm64' or platform_machine == 'x86_64'

dependencies.name: greenlet
dependencies.markers: platform_machine == 'AMD64' or platform_machine == 'WIN32' or platform_machine == 'aarch64' or platform_machine == 'amd64' or platform_machine == 'ppc64le' or platform_machine == 'win32' or platform_machine == 'x86_64'
